caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with "BOSS TALK" written in gold, and a gold watch sits at a table in a studio setting. He is speaking into a professional microphone while wearing headphones. Behind him is a white banner with a logo and the text "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the table is a black mug with red and white text that includes "THE TALK OUT". As the scene progresses, the man gestures with his right hand while speaking. The camera then cuts to another man wearing a green baseball cap, headphones, and a green t-shirt with the text "I CAN NEVER DO SHIT" printed in white. He is smiling and listening, also positioned in front of a microphone. The background behind him shows a retail-like space with clothing on hangers, mannequins, and framed photos on the wall.
